emails.subject: RE: Bill Rome Mediation
emails.body: RE: Bill Rome Mediation The Rome mediation scheduled for Thursday has been cancelled. --Lizzette

emails.subject: RE: Bill Rome Mediation
emails.body: The good news is, we don't owe a mediation fee, right? Lizzette, I'll give Jack a call. Michelle To: Cash, Michelle; Howard, Kevin A.; Goode, Diane; Slone, Jeanie

emails.subject: RE: Bill Rome Mediation
emails.body: Correct. --Lizzette To: Palmer, Lizzette; Howard, Kevin A.; Goode, Diane; Slone, Jeanie
